title: Scaling Event-Sourcing and CQRS
context: Need to implement Event-Sourcing and CQRS for global scale.
decision: Adopted Event-Sourcing and CQRS from HLD-System-Designs.
justification: Matches enterprise requirements for Separating read and write models with an immutable event log.

title: Scaling Microservices with API Gateway
context: Need to implement Microservices with API Gateway for global scale.
decision: Adopted Microservices with API Gateway from System Design Primer.
justification: Matches enterprise requirements for Standard pattern for scalable backends with centralized auth and routing.

title: Scaling Design Uber (Ride-Sharing)
context: Need to implement Design Uber (Ride-Sharing) for global scale.
decision: Adopted Design Uber (Ride-Sharing) from System Design Primer.
justification: Matches enterprise requirements for Geospatial indexing (S2/H3), real-time location tracking, and high-availability marketplace matching.

title: Scaling Sharding & Consistency at Instagram
context: Need to implement Sharding & Consistency at Instagram for global scale.
decision: Adopted Sharding & Consistency at Instagram from Best System Design Resources.
justification: Matches enterprise requirements for Techniques for horizontally scaling relational databases while maintaining global ordering.
